summary: Iteration 40 backend testing: (A) Missed-punch auto-close (open-shifts + auto-close endpoints, elapsed-hours + geofence-stale rules, idempotency, role scoping) and (B) profile-edit visibility (admin_stats.pending_profile_edits + cross-company /admin/profile-edits regression). 16/16 pytest cases passed against the public preview URL. Real super_admin PIN fields verified UNCHANGED at teardown. All IT40_* seed rows (2 companies, 6 users, ~9 attendance rows, 4 profile-edit requests, sessions) cleaned up.

minor.issue: Both filter attendance by date == today (UTC). If an employee's IN happened yesterday UTC and is now >12h old, the punch row's `date` field is 'yesterday' and it will be MISSED by both endpoints — the shift stays open forever and never auto-closes. Consider scanning a rolling window (e.g. date >= today - 1) so late-night/next-day scans still catch stale shifts.
Cosmetic dead-code block at server.py:1893-1895 (duplicate `user = await db.users.find_one(...)` / `return {...}`) sits after otp_verify's real return. Unreachable but should be removed.

action_items: Consider expanding the auto-close/open-shifts date filter to include yesterday's UTC date (or a 'date in {today, yesterday}' window) so shifts that cross UTC midnight are still caught by the periodic scan.
Optional cleanup: remove unreachable dead code at server.py:1893-1895.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py has grown to ~5580 lines; consider splitting attendance/auto-close, profile-edits, and admin_stats into separate modules for maintainability.

AUTO_CLOSE_TICK_SECONDS=600 hard-loops in a startup task with only try/except; if _auto_close_open_shifts raises, the loop swallows and continues — verified in code but worth adding a metric/log counter for prod visibility.
seed_data_creation: Seeded 2 IT40_ companies, 1 throwaway super_admin, 2 company_admins, 5 employees (varied attendance shapes: 13h-old IN, 5h IN no location, IN+OUT closed, 3h IN with stale outside-geofence ping, cross-company 13h IN), 4 profile_edit_requests (3 pending + 1 approved). All rows cleaned up in teardown. Real super_admin PIN fields verified unchanged post-run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test module uses `date=today` override on seeded attendance so 13h-old IN rows still fall inside the auto-close scan window even near UTC midnight. If the endpoint is later broadened to scan yesterday too, remove the override and re-verify. Scenario fixture is module-scoped; TestOpenShiftsList runs BEFORE TestAutoClose intentionally so open-shifts assertions see pre-close state.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no failing feature. One observation flagged: `date=today` filter on both auto-close and open-shifts endpoints will miss shifts that started before UTC midnight of the current day, leaving them permanently open. Recommended mitigation above.
